name: list_dir
description: List directory as a tree string up to a maximum depth and entry count; directories show (depth,size). If index.md exists in the listed directory, append its content at the end.

max_depth.description: Max traversal depth (0 means only current directory).

show_info.description: Whether to compute and display (depth,size) for each directory. Default true; set false to speed up very large directories.
